command.epitaphs.files.success: The following backups are available for %s:
command.epitaphs.highlight.success: Set new highlight location to %s in %s
command.epitaphs.list.failure.file: Failed to read position data for %s from file
command.epitaphs.list.latest: Your latest death was at %s in %s
command.epitaphs.list.success: Player %s has the following grave locations:
command.epitaphs.save.failure.full: Failed to save any player at %s
command.epitaphs.save.failure.partial: Failed to save some players at %s
config.epitaphs.backup_interval.tooltip:
§8Time in minutes between an automatic backup of all players. 0 to disable.§r

§7Default: 10§r
config.epitaphs.backup_max_age_days.tool:
§8Amount of days to keep backups before permanently removing them. 0 to disable§r

§7Default: 0§r
config.epitaphs.max_backups.tooltip:
§8Maximum number of backups to keep.§r
§8Backups are taken automatically every X minutes.§r

§7Default: 10§r
config.epitaphs.max_old_deaths.tooltip:
§8Maximum number of old deaths to keep.§r
§8Old deaths are from graves which have already been claimed.§r

§7Default: 5§r
config.epitaphs.tooltip_formatter.toolti:
§8Decides which time-date formatter to use for the grave tooltips§r

§7§lISO8601§r§7: Display Grave Tooltips in the ISO8601 format.§r
§7§lSYSTEM§r§7: Display Grave Tooltips adjusted to the System Settings.§r
§7Default: SYSTEM§r
enchantment.epitaphs.experience_soulboun: Keeps this item on the player after death. Additionally keeps 1/4th of the players xp
enchantment.epitaphs.soulbound.desc: Keeps this item on the player after death
message.epitaphs.experience_soulbound_hi: Combine soulbound armor with an experience bottle to apply experience soulbound
message.epitaphs.file_purged_info: This save was created before %s and automatically deleted!
message.epitaphs.file_purging_warning: This server has automatic file purging enabled.
message.epitaphs.grave_created: Created a grave with your items at %s
message.epitaphs.grave_no_access: This grave belongs to %s. You cannot access it
message.epitaphs.grave_op_bypass: You have sufficient permission to bypass this grave's access
message.epitaphs.highlight_info: Use %s to find your way back to your grave
message.epitaphs.restore_failed: Something went wrong trying to restore your items
message.epitaphs.soul_bottle_obtain: Obtained by using a bottle on a grave with a lingering soul
message.epitaphs.soul_bottle_use: Will teleport you to your last grave after drinking
message.epitaphs.soulbound_hint: Applies the soulbound enchantment when combined in an anvil
message.epitaphs.souls_hint: A soul is still trapped within this grave... maybe a bottle could work
message.epitaphs.souls_none: No souls linger in this grave anymore
